# cato_if_sub_policy (Resource)

Manages Internet Firewall sub-policy container. This resource only manages the sub-policy object. Sub-rules are managed via separate IF rule resources that reference this sub-policy.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `at` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--at))
- `policy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy))

<a id="nestedatt--at"></a>
### Nested Schema for `at`

Required:

- `position` (String)

Optional:

- `ref` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `description` (String)

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
